title: Pungent Crunchy Greek Beans Gigantes Plaki
description: A traditional Greek dish featuring large beans in a flavorful tomato sauce, seasoned with mustard and crunchy breadcrumbs, made with ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly ingredients and a hint of seasoned rice vinegar.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Drain and rinse the soaked gigantes beans.
Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the tomato sauce, seasoned rice vinegar, and dijon mustard, stirring to combine.
Bring the sauce to a simmer and add the drained gigantes beans, cooking for 10 minutes or until the beans are tender.
Transfer the bean mixture to a baking dish and top with breadcrumbs and crumbled feta cheese, if using.
Bake the gigantes plaki in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and crunchy.
